---
title: "Day 3<br>R for Researchers"
subtitle: "3rd SARA Summer School<br>22-26 July 2026"
format: revealjs
theme: [default, style-sea-summer.scss, sara-your-turn.scss]
slide-number: c/t
logo: images/logo-sara.png
incremental: false
execute: 
  echo: true
#footer: "[Study Material Website](https://sara-course-r4b.netlify.app/)"  
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: "https://images.unsplash.com/vector-1746618662777-7058cb830c6a?q=80&w=1567&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D"
---

## 

<br>

::::::: centering
:::::: columns
::: {.column width="35%"}
![](images/savitrimai.png){fig-alt="Sara's headshot" fig-align="center" width=250px style="border-radius: 50%;"}

#### Savitribai Phule (1831-1897)<br>🌺 🙏🏽🌼

:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

![](images/logo-sara.png){width="2.0in" fig-align="center"}
:::

::: {.column width="35%"}
![](images/ramai.png){fig-alt="Sara's headshot" fig-align="center" width=250px style="border-radius: 50%;"}

#### Ramabai Ambedkar (1898-1935)<br>🌺 🙏🏽🌼
:::
::::::

[**Savitribai Ramabai (SARA) Institute of Data Science, Sonipat**]{.r-fit-text}
:::::::

::: {.footer}
Title slide background source: [Yusuf](https://unsplash.com/@jack_aloya/illustrations)
:::

## About SARA {background-image="https://images.unsplash.com/vector-1754288532523-0f0f5e988cf5?q=80&w=1412&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D" background-size="50%" background-position="bottom right"}

> Since 2023, we believe education is for everyone.

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="60%"}

- Provides free open-source data science education
- Priority admission for marginalised communities & women
- Promoting AI Awareness

:::

::: {.column}

:::

:::


::: {.footer}
Image source [Afandi](https://unsplash.com/@kertiaa)
:::

## SARA Data Schools {background-color="black"}

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Summer School

::: {#fig-summer layout-ncol=2}

![1st, 22-26, July 2024](images/welcome/summer-students1.jpeg){#fig-surus}

![2nd, 25-29, July 2025](images/welcome/summer-students2.png){#fig-hanno}

Participants of the SARA Summer Schools "R for Researchers"
:::

### Winter School 

::: {#fig-winter layout-ncol=2}

![1st, 16-20, Dec 2024](images/welcome/winter-students1.jpeg){#fig-surus}

![2nd, 23-27,  Jan 2026](images/welcome/winter-students2.jpeg){#fig-hanno}

Participants of the SARA Winter Schools "Statistics using R"
:::

### Bootcamp

::: {#fig-bootcamp layout-ncol=2}

![1st, 3-7, March 2025](images/welcome/bootcamp-students1.jpg){#fig-surus}

![2nd, 20-22, March 2026](images/welcome/bootcamp-students2.png){#fig-hanno}

Participants of the SARA Coding Bootcamps "Publish using Quarto"
:::

::: 
---

##  {.your-turn}

<br>

:::: {.centering}

![](images/sonipat-bhawan.png)

[***The Ambedkar <br>Educational Society Sonipat (HR)***]{.r-fit-text}

::::

::: {.footer}
Established in 1969
:::

# "R for<br>Researchers"

[3rd SARA Summer School - July 2026]{.highlight}

## 3rd SARA Summer School {background-image="images/speakers/students.jpeg" background-size="40%" background-position="right"}

:::: {.nonincremental}
::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="70%"}

- 5 day, 40 hours, free data science education

- 10 participants from UG to PhD level

- Five international pro-bono guest speakers

:::

::: {.column}



:::

:::
::::


## Teaching Modules {background-image="images/welcome/flyer.png" background-size="30%" background-position="right"}

::: {.nonincremental}

- Day 1: Introduction to R & RStudio

- Day 2: Data import, clean, & wrangling

- [Day 3: Data visualization using ggplot]{.badge}

- Day 4: Quantitative analysis

- Day 5: Qualitative anlaysis

:::

::: {.footer}
Course slides [website](https://sara-course-r4b.netlify.app/)
:::

## SARA Online Guest Speakers {.r-fit-text}

::: {.layout-grid-img}

::: {.card}

![](images/speakers/jessica.png)

### Dr. Jessica Mar [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jessica-mar-0386772/)
University of Queensland - AU

:::


::: {.card}

![](images/speakers/ozan.png)

### Dr. Ozan Evkaya [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ozanevkaya/?skipRedirect=true)
University of Edinburgh - UK

:::

::: {.card}

![](images/speakers/bailey.png)

### Dr. Bailey Immel [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bailey-immel-phd/)
Data Scientist & Researcher - USA

:::

:::

## SARA In-person Speakers

::: {.layout-grid-img}

::: {.card}

![](images/speakers/nikee.png)

### Dr. Nikee [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/nikee-silayach-a13623231/)
CA & Manipal University - RJ

:::


::: {.card}

![](images/speakers/shivani.png)

### Miss. Shivani [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shivanisrvstv/)
Data Scientist & Researcher - DL

:::

::: {.card}

![](images/speakers/ajay.png)

### Dr. Ajay Koli [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ajay-kumar-koli/)
Data Educator SARA - HR

:::

:::

# {background-image="images/speakers/ozan-flyer.png" background-size="contain" background-color="black"}
